deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

devdoc.details: Decentralized identity storage for P2P Chat. Supports gasless registration and challenge-response authentication.

params._publicKey: The user's public key for ECDH.
params._user: The address of the user to register.

params._nonce: The challenge string to be signed.
params._signer: The address attempting to log in.

returns._0: bool True if the signature is valid, false otherwise.

devdoc.title: IdentityRegistry

getAddressByUsername(string).notice: Retrieves a user's address by their username.

registerUser(address,string,string,uint8.notice: Registers a new user via meta-transaction (gasless).

verifyLoginSignature(address,string,uint.notice: Verifies a login signature based on a challenge nonce.
